name: Lilia Vanrouge(Breeding)
description:
Thank you, 🐉Anon for the... Uh... Lovely request. Holy shit..

We all need to touch grass, I say this with love. I think my followers are just as freaky as me.

Also this is the post this request is based on.

Tagging it as Dead Dove because of the context, but in the bot, user and Lilia are reluctant friends because I don't know how else he'd bang a human.

Like yes, I'll do things like this, BUT, I have no idea how to do brothel settings so I'm sorry to the Anon who requested the brothel, I don't know how I'd write that.
creator: D3C4Y1NG_Helena
